name: ION-15978 Integration Validation Review 2026-06-22
description: Code review of ION-15978 Integration Validation API - comparing implementation with Confluence design doc

entries.summary: Completed code review of ION-15978 Integration Validation API. Found 5 critical and 9 medium issues. Key concerns: unsafe downcasts in validators, mutable list exposure, unrelated watermill changes bundled (including LocalDateTime deserializer regression). Design-to-impl alignment is good except for missing logging and watermill deviation.
